project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Next.js 15 frontends + Fastify 5 backends + shared packages
build_system: pnpm 10 + Turborepo 2. Apps use `next build`, packages use `tsc`. Turbo handles dependency ordering.
test_framework: Vitest 2 with `vitest run` in each package/app
verification_instructions: Run `pnpm turbo typecheck`, `pnpm turbo build`, `pnpm turbo test`, `pnpm turbo lint` - all must pass
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22 available. pnpm 10 installed. All dependencies already installed.
contribution_requirements: All 4 turbo tasks (typecheck, build, test, lint) must pass. Branch: feat/production-ready-fixes

key_patterns.frontend_pattern: Next.js 15 App Router (apps/quantchat, quantmail, quantai, quantdrive, admin) or Pages Router (apps/quantads pages/ dir, and dead apps quantmax/quantneon/quantedits use pages/_app.tsx pattern)
key_patterns.backend_pattern: Fastify 5 via @quant/server-core createApp() - registers Prisma, auth, health, metrics plugins
key_patterns.api_proxy_pattern: Frontend api routes proxy to backend via fetch() - e.g. apps/quantai/src/app/api/assistant/chat/route.ts proxies to QUANTAI_BACKEND_URL
key_patterns.hooks_pattern: React Query hooks in src/hooks/ calling api-client services - e.g. useInbox, useConversations, useFiles
key_patterns.dead_apps: quantmax, quantneon, quantedits have NO next.config.js, NO next dependency, NO build/typecheck scripts. They use pages/_app.tsx pattern with React Query providers
key_patterns.admin_panel: apps/admin - Next.js app with /api/health and /api/stats routes returning hardcoded mock data
key_patterns.ws_gateway: services/ws-gateway uses @quant/realtime WebSocketServer with JWT auth, presence, channels
key_patterns.notifications: packages/notifications has NotificationFanout, PushService, InAppService, EmailDigest
key_patterns.search: packages/search has SearchClient, HybridSearchEngine, CrossAppSearch, VectorClient

directory_structure: apps/ (17 apps: admin, marketing, quantads, quantai, quantcalendar, quantchat, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantedits, quantmail, quantmax, quant-mobile, quantneon, quantsync, quantmeet, quantube, status) | packages/ (90+ shared packages) | services/ (8: cdc-relay, ci-runner, git-server, matchmaking, moderation-worker, search-indexer, smtp-inbound, ws-gateway)
